sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n1818" key="a)zhlo/tupos" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀζηλό-τῠπος</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ον</itype>, <sense id="n1818.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">free from envy</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0007.tlg006:Lyc::Num::3" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Plu.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Comp.Lyc.Num.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">3</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
